text.title: Figma AI Ecosystem Boundary Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Do all four `Applies If` preconditions hold for the current task?

conclusion.verdict: exit without producing the artefact; document why
run the full procedure; emit the artefact
fix the primary constraint first; do not produce a degraded artefact

example.trace: precondition checks pass → skip disqualifiers fail → primary constraint holds → run-the-checklist → emit decision-record
